character.core_question: What do we observe — and how do we know it?

seamless_set.lighting: 5500K bilateral soft key — cool-clinical, no magenta vignette

voice.signature_beat: What do we observe — and how do we know it?
voice.prompt_suffix: Warm mid-Atlantic baritone; clear enthusiastic science communicator.

continuity_lock_verbatim: CONTINUITY LOCK @Julian-001: identical presenter face, smart-casual wardrobe, seamless neutral set, same eye-line to camera — seamless continuation of prior take, zero jump cut.

episode_reuse.host_shots: Lead every prompt with 31-year-old Julian Cross; smart-casual wardrobe; @Set-Seamless-Neutral-001
episode_reuse.viz_payoff: Label OBSERVED / SIMULATION / MODEL / NOT TO SCALE on science visualization beats
